description_long: This is a military-style metal ammunition box, painted in olive drab green with visible signs of wear and rust along the edges and corners. The box is rectangular with a hinged lid that features a robust folding metal handle on top for carrying. On the side, there is a prominent yellow stenciled label indicating its contents: 5.56mm ball ammunition, 10 round clips, and a lot code. The front face has a sturdy latch mechanism for securing the lid, and the overall construction appears rugged and utilitarian, designed for durability in harsh environments. The box is likely hollow inside, intended to store and transport tools, ammunition, or other small items. Its exterior finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture due to the paint and wear.
description: A rugged, olive green metal ammunition box with a folding handle, yellow stenciled labeling, and a secure latch. The box shows signs of wear and is designed for durable storage and transport.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the box is visible, showing the latch mechanism and part of the folding handle.
description_view_1: The side view displays the yellow stenciled labeling and the full length of the hinged lid with its handle.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end is shown, mostly featureless except for the edge of the lid and handle.
description_view_3: Another side view similar to view 1, with the yellow stenciled labeling clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Folding rectangular steel handle mounted on the lid, fixed at both ends, designed for carrying; no ergonomic padding or special features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Steel clasp latch mechanism on the front, designed to secure the lid tightly; no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, no visible trays, bins, or dividers; compartment is accessed by lifting the hinged lid.
attribute_external_labeling: 840 CRTG 5.56MM BALL M855 10 ROUND CLIPS LC-09M387-375 (yellow stenciled text on side)
